smg.text: Mainly cloudy. A few rain patches in the morning. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Dry. Mainly fine. Force 4 to 6 easterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 5 to 6 easterly winds with gusts, becoming force 3 to 4.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
